personal.name: Ashaen Manuel
personal.title: Aspiring Game Developer
personal.bio: I build games and thoughtful tools that make complex ideas feel intuitive — often with chessboards, quantum twists, and a lot of curiosity.

projects.title: Quantum Chess
projects.description: A unique chess game incorporating quantum mechanics, allowing pieces to exist in superposition and collapse based on player actions.
highlights: Developed quantum measurement techniques to manage piece states
Evaluated multiple quantum measurement strategies for optimal gameplay
Showcased expertise in Python and Pygame

projects.title: Melbourne Housing Price Predictor
projects.description: A user-friendly interface for exploring Melbourne housing data and predicting prices based on various inputs.
highlights: Designed intuitive interface for data exploration
Implemented predictive models for price analysis
Utilized React and FastAPI for seamless functionality

projects.title: Chess Puzzle Solving AI
projects.description: Four different AI systems capable of solving complex chess puzzles using advanced search algorithms.
highlights: Implemented Minimax, DFS, BFS, and Alpha-Beta Pruning
Designed AI to evaluate multiple move sequences
Showcased strong grasp of AI methodologies
